text.autoconfig.imageframeclient.title: ImageFrame Client Settings
Use Native Resolution and Full Color Map Images
Use native resolution and full color map images sent from the server.
Preview maps when you hover over them in your inventory.
Notify when Server Supports ImageFrame Client
Show a message in chat when you join a server if they support ImageFrame client.
message.server_supported: This server has ImageFrame and will show images in native resolution and full color!
